name: Rich Cachupa
description: Corn, beans, sweet potato, cassava, vegetables, assorted meats and sausages, fresh herbs, and optional salted fish.

name: Grilled Lobster
description: Fresh lobster, garlic, and butter, served with smoked sweet potato purée, seasonal vegetables, and fresh herbs.

name: Tuna & Mango
description: Seared fresh tuna with mango sauce, microgreens, crunchy seeds, and optional balsamic reduction.

name: Fish Broth
description: Seafood broth with fresh fish, shrimp, vegetables, herbs, and optional rice.

name: Papaya & Cheese
description: Ripe papaya with fresh cheese, cream, brown sugar, citrus zest, and mint garnish.

name: Cow's Sarabudja
description: Selected cow's foot, white beans, corn, sweet potato, vegetables, fresh herbs, and a touch of white wine.
